input_text: Hi, this is Maya from GreenLeaf Foods. We need a quote for redesigning our wholesale order form. Budget is $4,500 and we'd like it done by 2026-05-15. Please send proposal and timeline.

input_text: Ticket: UrbanFit Gym app login errors for members. Contact: Elena. Please investigate and update status page. Not urgent but should be handled this week.
From Rachel at Pine & Co Legal: need invoice automation setup. Budget approved: $7,250. Deadline is 2026-05-20. Please send onboarding checklist.
Meeting notes - ClearWave Clinic. Sarah wants a HIPAA training session for new staff on 2026-05-08. No price mentioned. Need slides and attendance sheet.

input_text: Email: Hi team, Lisa here from Beacon School. We need 30 laptops configured before 2026-08-15. Approved budget is USD 24,000. Please send procurement options.
Ticket from Malik at Harbor Insurance: dashboard export button broken after last release. Please patch and confirm when deployed.
Meeting note: Nova Retail wants a pilot of foot-traffic analytics. Contact is Irene. Pilot budget: £12k. Kickoff target 2026-05-05.
Email from Tom, BluePeak Energy: need security review for vendor portal. Deadline 2026-05-31. Please provide scope and cost estimate.
Support ticket: FloraMart checkout returns 500 error. Contact: Nina. This is blocking all online orders, fix immediately.
Call with Diego at Summit Builders: wants CRM migration from old spreadsheets. Budget 15,000 USD. Need migration plan by 2026-05-10.
Email: Karen from MedSupply Direct asked for a pricing sheet for 500 barcode scanners. No deadline, just send when ready.

input_text: Meeting note - Contact: Victor, Company: Eastline Bank. Request: fraud alert workflow audit. Budget cap is $30k. Final report due 2026-07-01.
Ticket from FreshBox Meals: delivery ETA SMS not firing. Ask for Anika. Please investigate logs and resend failed messages.
Email from Jules at Metro Arts: need event landing page live by 2026-06-05. Budget is $3,800. Include ticketing widget.
Call note: Hadi from Cedar Pharma asked for quarterly analytics report. No budget mentioned. Send draft by 2026-04-30.
hey it's Nora from LoopPay. Can you guys look at the onboarding emails? conversions fell last week. Not sure if this is copy or tracking. We can spend around $2k if needed, but first just diagnose.

target.notes: Budget is approximate and conditional if needed; issue may be copy or tracking.

input_text: Support: From Teo @ Bricklane Properties. The tenant portal is slow again, especially invoices. Please check DB and CDN. Need answer before our Monday ops call.

target.notes: Budget range of €8-10k was mentioned but not approved.

input_text: Call: Alex from Stonebridge Capital asked whether we can clean their CRM duplicates. He said 'ideally before month end' but no hard date. No budget, wants estimate.

input_text: Meeting note: Frida at Oak & Stone Furniture wants inventory forecasting. No confirmed scope yet. She asked us to send two options: cheap MVP and full rollout.

input_text: Email chain summary: We told Horizon Biotech $12k for the audit, but Emma replied 'finance approved 9,500 max unless this includes pen test too'. Also says launch is 'first week of June'. Need decide scope + reply.

Prepare usable installer app for Texas rollout
